rationale: All brief elements are present and correct: a #7C5CFF ring mark with a contrasting white inner squircle and orbit dots, a wide bold white NOVA wordmark with generous tracking, and a muted gray 'light the way' tagline, on the specified near-black background. The filmstrip shows the intended choreography — mark assembles first, wordmark/tagline fade-rise in around the 25% still, a long hold with the lockup intact, and a clean fade to black by the final frame. Motion reads as intentional with no teleporting, though the subtle float during the hold is barely perceptible across tiles and the per-letter fade at 25% looks slightly uneven. Composition is balanced with a pleasant glow treatment; only minor optical-centering looseness between wordmark and tagline keeps it from top marks.
